name: Vocell Bus Co
recent_news: No recent M&A. Long-tenured 100+ year family business; HQ relocated from Billerica to Malden MA; Medford yard at 171 Corporation Way.
fit_notes: Highly attractive Boston-metro tuck-in: 100+ year Goodman family operator with ~100 buses, anchor Medford and Boston Public Schools contracts, plus Tufts. Independent, family-owned with multi-generation tenure suggesting succession potential. Note: addressed file shows 'Vocell Bus Co Bus Co' and lists Medford yard only - true HQ is Malden, MA; fleet/revenue understated in source file.

name: Nichols Bus Service Inc
recent_news: Founder Charlie Nichols passed away June 2018 at age 90; daughter Deborah (Nichols) Johnson identified as VP. Strong succession signal given founder death and 2nd-gen leadership of 80+ year-old company.
fit_notes: Very attractive CT tuck-in: 80+ year-old family operator with ~103 vehicles serving 5 contiguous CT towns (Portland/East Hampton/Andover/Marlborough/East Haddam). Founder deceased 2018; 2nd-gen VP Debbie Johnson + spouse run the operation - classic high-succession-signal target. Note: distinct from Nichols Bus Inc. of Fleetville PA (different family/company). Source file fleet/revenue (~24 employees, ~$1M) appears materially understated vs. 103-vehicle fleet.
